notes: Full rest. Adductor still painful. No running.
Walk 20-30 min only. Sleep priority.
Upper body only. No leg work. Psoas march, adductor rock-back, thoracic rotation.
Gentle padel if adductor allows. Stop if pulling sensation.
Walk and mobility only.
Upper body only. No leg work. Hip flexor and hamstring stretches.
Optional 30 min walk.
Full rest. Assess adductor: pain-free at rest before resuming Workout A.
Resume Workout A at 50% load. Copenhagen plank 3×20 sec each side. Check right adductor.
No running yet. Walk if adductor pain-free.
Full Pull B session resumes. Psoas march, adductor rock-back.
Padel evening. Monitor adductor.
No running. Mobility only.
Full Push C resumes. Soleus and hip flexor stretches.
Padel or rest. No long run yet.
Rest. Ready to resume running from Week 3.
Copenhagen plank 3×25 sec. Standing hip flexion band 3×15. 70% effort throughout.
First run back. Conversational pace only. Stop immediately if adductor pulls.
Full Pull B. Psoas march 2×20. Adductor rock-back 2×10 each side.
Evening padel. No padel if adductor flared on Tuesday run.
Easy Z2. Same rule — stop if adductor pulls. Build confidence.
Full Push C. Hip flexor stretch 90 sec each side focus right.
Padel. Active recovery.
First long run back. Easy only. 12km. Scan adductor at km 5 and km 10.
Copenhagen plank → 30 sec. Progressive overload resumes on main lifts.
Easy Z2. Build weekly km gradually.
Full Pull B. Face pulls 4×15. External rotations.
Padel evening. Legs should be fine — Pull day is upper body.
Easy Z2. Stay conversational.
Full Push C. Shoulder press for overhead stability.
15km long run. Last 2km on grass or soft surface. Easy pace throughout.
Padel. Active recovery after long run. Monitor adductor.
Copenhagen plank → 35 sec. Add weight to Bulgarian split squat.
Easy Z2. Comfortable and conversational.
Full Pull B. Psoas march and adductor rock-back every session.
Padel evening.
Easy Z2.
Full Push C. Lateral raises for shoulder width.
Padel.
17km long run. Last 3km on trail, grass or park. Copenhagen → 40 sec.

Full Pull B. Pull-ups: add weight if hitting 10 clean reps.

Easy Z2. Keep truly conversational.
Full Push C. Progressive overload on bench and incline.
20km long run. Mixed surface. Copenhagen plank → 45 sec. Key milestone.
Padel. Day after long run — keep padel easy.
Down week. Same exercises, 70% load. Copenhagen plank maintained.
Down week easy run.
Pull B at 70% load. Recovery focus.
Padel evening.

Push C at 70%. Let the adaptation settle.

Full Pull B. Psoas march and thoracic rotation.
Padel evening. Upper body focus day so legs are fresh for Thursday.
6×4 min @ 5:30/km with 2 min walk recovery. Warm-up 10 min + cool-down 10 min. First interval session.
Full Push C. Upper body only — no leg fatigue going into Sunday.

22km long run. At least 8km on trail or soft surface. Easy pace.

Full Pull B.

6×4 min @ 5:30/km with 2 min walk recovery. Same session — focus on consistency of effort.

5×1km @ 5:10-5:20/km with 90 sec recovery. Step up from 4-min reps to 1km reps. Lactate threshold work.

Peak training week. Keep loads moderate — 1-2 reps in reserve. Running takes priority.

50% load. No Copenhagen to failure. Keep movement quality. No new exercises.

3km easy + 4×100m strides at race pace. Wake up fast-twitch without creating fatigue.
Full rest. Prepare gear. Confirm aid station locations. Eat well. Sleep early.
RACE DAY. Km 0-5: 5:50/km. Km 5-15: 5:35-5:40/km. Km 15-21: everything left. Gel at km 7 and km 14. Target: sub-2:00.
